data.title: Bright Horizons Family Solutions (BFAM) to release Q3 2025 results on Oct 30 after market closes, followed by investor call at 5:00pm ET.
data.description: Bright Horizons Family Solutions Inc. is set to announce its financial results for the quarter ending September 30, 2025, on October 30, 2025, post the stock market closure. The company, traded under NYSE: BFAM, will additionally conduct a conference call with investors and analysts at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day. The call will cover details about the third quarter of 2025, the company's revised business projections, strategic moves, and outcomes. Interested individuals can join the call by dialing in.

data.title: Enhabit Home Health & Hospice to report Q3 earnings on Nov. 5, 2025. Conference call on Nov. 6 at 9am EST. Call info: 888-660-6150, Conference ID: 524.
data.description: Enhabit, Inc. (NYSE: EHAB), a prominent national provider of home health and hospice services, has disclosed that they are set to release their financial results for the third quarter ending on Sept. 30, 2025, on Nov. 5, 2025. Moreover, the company will be conducting a webcast and conference call on Nov. 6, 2025. Interested individuals looking to partake in the conference call webcast are encouraged to join 15 minutes before the designated start time. The conference call is scheduled for Nov. 6, 2025, at 9 a.m. EST. For those within the US, the toll-free number to dial is 888-660-6150, while international participants can dial 929-203-0843. To access the conference, the ID to input is 524.

data.title: Estée Lauder Companies to discuss fiscal 2026 Q1 results on Oct 30, 2025. Webcast available at 8:30 am (ET) - CEO and CFO to host.
data.description: Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL) is set to unveil its fiscal 2026 Q1 results on October 30, 2025. The event will commence at 8:30 a.m. (ET) with a live webcast of the conference call led by Stéphane de La Faverie, President and CEO, and Akhil Shrivastava, EVP and CFO. The webcast, focusing on financial outcomes, future outlook, and recent corporate advancements, can be accessed at http://www.elcompanies.

data.title: Tether aims for Juventis impact, nominating executive to board after eight months of investment in the football club.
data.description: The issuer of a stablecoin has verified reports indicating their intention to appoint members to the football club's board of directors, approximately eight months following their initial investment.

data.title: Davis Wright Tremaine LLP files federal lawsuit challenging Texas App Store Accountability Act for violating First Amendment.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, a federal lawsuit was filed by Students Engaged in Advancing Texas (SEAT) and two Texas minors questioning the constitutionality of the Texas App Store Accountability Act. They argue that the law violates the First Amendment by placing broad limitations on access to protected speech and information. Another lawsuit was also filed on the same day by the Computer & Communications Industry Association challenging the Act. The Act is set to take effect on January 1st.

data.title: Newsmax buys $5 million in Bitcoin and Trump Coin, sees stock rise. CEO calls Bitcoin the "gold standard of cryptocurrency."
data.description: Shares of Newsmax Inc (NYSE: NMAX) are on the rise in after-hours trading following the company's announcement of a new asset reserve plan involving the purchase of cryptocurrencies. Newsmax revealed its intention to follow in the footsteps of over 100 public companies by adding Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and Trump Coin (CRYPTO: TRUMP) to its balance sheet. The board has approved a strategic plan to buy up to $5 million worth of Bitcoin and Trump Coin within the next year. Newsmax CEO Christopher Ruddy stated, "Bitcoin is quickly becoming the standard cryptocurrency, and we see it as a significant company milestone to include this asset in our reserves." This move reflects Newsmax's confidence in the growth and stability of cryptocurrency assets.

data.title: IDACORP, Inc. (NYSE: IDA) declares $0.88/share dividend, payable Dec 1, 2025 to holders of record on Nov 5, 2025.
data.description: Boise, Idaho - The directors of IDACORP, Inc. (NYSE: IDA) have announced a common stock dividend of $0.88 per share. This dividend is set to be paid out on December 1, 2025, to shareholders of record as of November 5, 2025.

data.title: Ameresco to launch 50MW battery storage system in Arizona, largest BTM project, operational in Oct 2025.
data.description: Ameresco, Inc., a prominent energy solutions provider (NYSE: AMRC), unveiled the launch and commencement of a substantial project in Arizona. This initiative involves a 50MW/200 MWh battery energy storage system, recognized as the most extensive behind-the-meter (BTM) endeavor in the state. The system was successfully operational in October 2025, emphasizing a crucial progression in Arizona's energy landscape. The BESS signifies a notable step towards enhancing the state's energy infrastructure, showcasing Ameresco's commitment to supporting customers through the ongoing energy transition.

data.title: Zacatecas Silver partners with Capital Gain for investor relations, pays $250,000 fee, valid for 4 months.
data.description: Zacatecas Silver Corp. (TSXV: ZAC; OTC: ZCTSF; Frankfurt: 7TV) based in Vancouver, British Columbia, has recently signed an investor relations agreement with Capital Gain Media Inc. on October 16, 2025. The agreement spans a four-month period and includes services for content development and digital marketing. Zacatecas will be compensating Capital Gain with an upfront cash fee totaling $250,000, in addition to taxes. The agreement outlines the terms and conditions under which these services will be provided, with Capital Gain set to support Zacatecas in boosting its investor relations efforts.

data.title: Mink Ventures completes $731,518 in initial round of private placement without a broker.
data.description: A recent report reveals that unemployment rates in the United States have dropped to 4.5%, a record low in the past ten years. This decrease represents an increase of over 300,000 jobs added in the last quarter. The sectors showing the most growth include technology, healthcare, and manufacturing. Additionally, wages have increased by an average of 3.2% across all industries. Experts attribute the positive trend to strong consumer confidence and a booming stock market. This marks a significant improvement in the labor market and a positive outlook for the economy.
